task_completion.description: Navigate to the Nutrition Plans section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger web interface shows the 'Nutrition plans' overview page or the nutrition menu is actively selected.
The screen displays the details page for the nutrition plan named 'Maintenance Diet'.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Lunch' meal within the plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lunch' meal section is visible on the screen within the 'Maintenance Diet' plan.

task_completion.description: Remove the 'Cola Drink' ingredient from the meal
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots of the 'Lunch' meal, the ingredient 'Cola Drink' is no longer listed, or a deletion confirmation/action is visible.

task_completion.description: Ensure other food items are not deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ingredients 'Chicken Breast Raw', 'Brown Rice Cooked', and 'Broccoli Raw' are still clearly visible under the 'Lunch' meal after the removal of the Cola Drink.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Lunch' meal itself is not deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lunch' meal header and its container remain visible in the 'Maintenance Diet' plan after the agent completes the task.

integrity.description: The agent used the wger web GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and wger UI elements (buttons, menus, delete icons) rather than a terminal executing SQL or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the removal
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manually delete or hide the HTML node for the 'Cola Drink'.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected outcome into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place within the actual wger application in the browser, not in a text editor or note-taking app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Plan: 'Maintenance Diet'. Target Meal: 'Lunch'. Target Ingredient to remove: 'Cola Drink'. Sibling Ingredients that MUST remain: 'Chicken Breast Raw', 'Brown Rice Cooked', 'Broccoli Raw'.
